facts.context: The fastest-folding proteins (like villin headpiece, ~microseconds) fold quickly because:
facts.truth: their folding landscape has a single dominant funnel with minimal frustration and no significant traps
distractors: they are small enough that the conformational search space can be exhaustively sampled by thermal fluctuations
their native contacts form cooperatively in a single nucleation event without intermediate states
their amino acid composition creates an unusually smooth energy surface with low barriers between all states
